query: Saskaloppet cross country ski race La Ronge

videos.title: Nordic Racing in Saskatchewan
videos.description:
Each year, hundreds of skiers glide through the rolling hills of stunning Lac La Ronge Provincial Park during the Don Allen Saskaloppet. The province’s premier cross-country ski event features over 50 km of groomed ski trails and has been running strong since 1983.
Learn more: https://www.saskaloppet.ca/

videos.title: 2018 Don Allen Saskaloppet
videos.description: Hundreds of skiers compete in the mass start at 10 a.m. on March 3.

videos.title: Skiing Northern Saskatchewan: The Don Allen Saskaloppet
videos.description:
This past weekend I had the wonderful opportunity of visiting Saskatchewan's Northern country in La Ronge for the 32nd Don Allen Saskaloppet. 

With over 300 skiers signed up and 8 different distances, the Saskaloppet truly offers something for everyone and every skill level.

videos.title: Photos: Cross country skiers in La Ronge get instructions from an Olympic skier and her coach
videos.description: This spring, four-time Olympian Sharon Firth and her former coach, Anders Lenes, travelled to La Ronge to talk to kids about what it takes to become a world-class skier.

videos.title: La Ronge To Kitsakie Island At Sunset, Crossing A Frozen Lake On Ski - 30 Min Snow Crunch Walk
